description: The agent promises to text the booking link while consent_to_text is false, tripping sms_promise_no_consent.

transcript_object.content: Thanks for calling Acme Wellness, this is Ava. How can I help you today?
Can you send me the booking link?
Absolutely — I'll text you the booking link so you can pick a time that works.
You're all set. Thanks for calling Acme Wellness!
